---
name: Feature proposal
about: Propose a new feature or capability — open an issue and we can collaborate on it
title: "feature: <short title>"
labels: enhancement
---

<!--
This is the right place for new ideas. rice-qrspi doesn't take unsolicited pull requests,
but I'm glad to collaborate on a good feature that comes in as an issue first. Lay out the
idea here and we can work out the approach (and who builds it) together.
-->

## What & why

What's the feature, and what problem does it solve?

## How it might work

A rough sketch — which stage(s) or config fields it touches, or how it'd behave. Keep it
stack-neutral where you can (anything that varies by stack belongs in `config.json`, not a
stage command).

## Want to help build it?

Totally optional — but if you'd like to collaborate on implementing it, say so and we'll
figure out the next step together.
